category_sources: source_facts.description says ascii2binary converts between textual and binary representations of numbers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and project id brew:ascii2binary identify the display name as ascii2binary.
docs_sources: Official source_facts.homepage is the project page and best available documentation surface for ascii2binary.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; official project page lists the ascii2binary source distribution and the author maintains an official GitHub repository for ascii2binary.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes conversion between textual and binary number representations.
